fields.summary: [DEV] Enhance flightctl-restore to accept backup archive argument

content.text: As a FlightCtl administrator, I want to invoke `flightctl-restore <archive-path>` to restore from a backup archive, so that I can restore FlightCtl state after a disaster.
`flightctl-restore <archive-path>` accepts archive path as first positional argument
Restore command logs archive path when provided
Restore command extracts archive to temporary directory
Restore command reads `metadata.json` from extracted archive
Restore command validates deployment type matches current environment
Restore fails with clear error if deployment type mismatch
Restore fails with clear error if archive path does not exist or is not readable
Temporary extraction directory cleaned up on success or failure
Unit tests cover argument parsing, extraction, metadata validation

Modify `cmd/flightctl-restore/main.go` to accept the archive path as a required positional argument (no backwards compatibility). Create `internal/restore/archive.go` with archive extraction and metadata validation functions.
